originalAlarm.description: Branch condition evaluates to a garbage value

reasoning: eef2317b9f5.c L30: 'if (buf)' branch condition evaluates to garbage value (// WARNING / // ERROR). When cmd=8, the code jumps via 'goto all_done' at L23, skipping the malloc at L26. buf remains uninitialized (declared at L6 but never assigned). When CONFIG_FEATURE_CLEAN_UP=T, the 'if (buf)' at L30 evaluates an uninitialized buf — garbage value. PC=CONFIG_FEATURE_CLEAN_UP=T correctly constrains when this branch exists. Known bug.
